`$PLAN`: `/docs/plans/test-code/test-plan-04-frontend-e2e.md` 

Update frontend E2E test codes by following `$PLAN`. Install necessary dependencies to ensure test runs.

After that, review test codes with `/docs/code-review/test-code-review-guideline.md`, and loop through "refine & review" until no progress is made or user should decide to move forward.
